message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Sequence diagram for the whole CCX (external) data pipeline

box "Insights operator" #LightGreen
participant "Control logic" as CL
database "IO memory cache" as IO
end box

participant "Smart\nProxy" as SP #LightBlue
participant "3Scale" as TS
participant "CRD" as CRD
participant "OCP\nWebConsole" as OCP #LightBlue

== Pulling data from Smart Proxy ==

CL -> SP : Get\nrecommendations\norg ID\ncluster ID
SP -> TS : Get\nrecommendations\norg ID\ncluster ID
TS --> SP : Recommendations\nfor cluster
SP --> CL : Recommendations\nfor cluster

== Exposing recommendations ==

CL -> IO : Store\nrecommendations
IO -> CRD : Expose\nrecommendations

== Pulling from OCP WebConsole ==

CRD -> OCP : Read\nrecommendations
CRD --> OCP : Here are\nrequired data

caption Copyright © 2020 Red Hat, Inc. Author: Pavel Tisnovsky
@enduml
```
